list.title: Agents

banner.heading: Build intelligent agents
banner.description: Create AI-powered agents that answer questions from your knowledge base, automate workflows, and help your team be more productive. Connect to your existing tools and let agents handle repetitive tasks.

list.error: Failed to load agents. Please try again.

toasts.publishedDescription: Agent is now live and available to users.
toasts.unpublishedDescription: Agent is no longer available to users.

name.description: Pick a clear, action-oriented name your users will recognize.

skills.description: Capabilities the agent can perform. Add skills from your library or create new ones.

instructions.description: Tell the agent who it is, how it should behave, and when its job is done. Use ## headings to structure (Role, Backstory, Goal, Task).
examples: ## Role You are an HR onboarding assistant…
## Goal The user has submitted their I-9 and reviewed the handbook.

conversationStarters.description: Suggested prompts shown to users when they open this agent.

guardrails.description: Topics or actions the agent must NOT handle. Be specific.

builder.loadError: Failed to load agent. Please try again.

changeTypeModal.title: Change Agent Type
changeTypeModal.description: Select a new agent type. This will affect available configuration options.
changeTypeModal.knowledgeRemoved: Knowledge sources will be removed ({{count}} sources)
changeTypeModal.behaviorChange: Agent behavior and capabilities will change

confirmTypeChangeModal.title: Confirm Type Change
confirmTypeChangeModal.subtitle: This action affects a saved agent
confirmTypeChangeModal.warningMessage: Changing the agent type for {{agentName}} will modify how this agent works. Users who interact with this agent may experience different behavior.

publishModal.title: Publish agent
publishModal.description: Publishing will make this agent active and available to be matched with real users in this environment.

unlinkWorkflowModal.title: Unlink Workflow
unlinkWorkflowModal.warning: Unlinking this workflow will remove it from the other agent. Each workflow can only be connected to one agent at a time.

unpublishModal.title: Unpublish agent?
unpublishModal.description: This will remove the agent from active matching. Users will no longer be able to interact with it. You can republish at any time.
